dict.string:
PI Weekly Briefing — a personalized research-lab weekly briefing. Run it every Monday (or set a weekly Automation: Shortcuts ▸ Automation ▸ Time of Day ▸ Weekly).
WHAT IT DOES (all accessible to Shortcuts): • Reads the week's calendar events • Pulls the latest arXiv papers in your field (CUSTOMIZE the category below) • Assembles everything into one weekly briefing • Deep-links you into Slack + email + Zoom for fast triage
HONEST BOUNDARY: Shortcuts cannot read your Slack/Gmail message CONTENT or act inside those apps — no API exposes that. It opens them for you. Reading/drafting is an agent's job (e.g. Claude); this shortcut aggregates what is accessible and launches the rest.
CUSTOMIZE: arXiv category (physics.acc-ph for SLAC accelerator work — change to your field, e.g. cond-mat, hep-ex, q-bio), and your Slack workspace deep link.
📅 Your week, PI. Here's the week ahead on your calendar plus this week's newest arXiv in your field. Tap through to triage Slack and email below.
